calendarFaqs.q: How can I add Houston Independent School District's school calendar to Google Calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: To add the Houston Independent School District 2026-2027 calendar to Google Calendar, download the .ics file from this page, then open Google Calendar, go to Settings → Import & Export → Import, and upload the file. All school holidays, breaks, and key dates will appear on your calendar automatically.

calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Houston Independent School District in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Houston Independent School District is Monday, August 10, 2026. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Houston Independent School District in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Houston Independent School District is Friday, May 28, 2027. The school year runs from August through May, covering 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2026-2027 for Houston Independent School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Houston Independent School District runs Mar 8, 2027–Mar 12, 2027, 5 days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2026-2027 for Houston Independent School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Houston Independent School District runs Dec 21, 2026–Jan 1, 2027, 12 days. School resumes Jan 5, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: How long is Thanksgiving break for Houston Independent School District in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Thanksgiving break for Houston Independent School District runs Nov 23, 2026–Nov 27, 2026, 5 days.

calendarFaqs.q: How many teacher work days does Houston Independent School District have in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Houston Independent School District has 192 teacher work days in 2026-2027. This includes all 180 student instructional days plus 12 additional days for planning, professional development, and pre- and post-school year activities. Based on the official Houston Independent School District teacher work calendar.

yearNumbers.label: Ends Earlier
yearNumbers.detail: Last day moves from Jun 4 to May 28 — the school year no longer runs into June vs 2025–2026.

yearNumbers.label: Starts Earlier
yearNumbers.detail: First day moves from Aug 12 to Aug 10 vs 2025–2026.

yearNumbers.label: Chavez-Huerta Day Dropped
yearNumbers.detail: The Chavez-Huerta Day observed holiday does not appear on the 2026–2027 calendar, unlike 2025–2026.

calendarNotes: Houston ISD begins the 2026–2027 school year on August 10, 2026 — among the earliest starts of any major US urban district. Spring Break runs March 8–12, 2027, one of the earlier spring break windows in Texas. The school year ends May 28, 2027.
seoDescription: Houston ISD 2026-2027 school calendar with all holidays, spring break Mar 8–12, and key dates. Download the official PDF or sync to Google Calendar.
diffNotes: Hurricane season (June–November) overlaps the first weeks of school. HISD has built in makeup days, but extended closures may push the last day past May 28 — book late-May travel with flexibility.
